context: Tests whether the agent uses the video_to_music endpoint (not compose) for video-backed music generation, correctly separates high-level musical direction into description vs concise style keywords into tags, and respects the API's constraint of up to 10 tags.

checklist.name: Correct API method
checklist.description: The script uses client.music.video_to_music() (not music.compose or another method) to generate music from video

checklist.name: Video files passed
checklist.description: Each call to video_to_music passes the video file(s) as the videos parameter

checklist.name: Description used for narrative
checklist.description: The description parameter is used for high-level narrative/emotional direction (a sentence or more), not for short style words

checklist.name: Tags used for style cues
checklist.description: Concise style keywords (e.g. 'cinematic', 'upbeat') are passed via the tags parameter, not embedded into the description string

checklist.name: Tags count within limit
checklist.description: Each call uses 10 or fewer tags (the API maximum per call)

checklist.name: Tags and description separate
checklist.description: The generation_plan.md documents description and style keywords as distinct items (not merged into one field)

checklist.name: Audio stream saved correctly
checklist.description: The script saves audio by iterating over chunks from the stream into an open file, not treating the result as a single blob

checklist.name: Three outputs documented
checklist.description: The generation_plan.md documents all three clips with their respective descriptions and tag lists

checklist.name: Python elevenlabs import
checklist.description: The script imports from the elevenlabs package (Python) and uses ElevenLabs() client
